message:
feat: add beta_feedback_loop module for structured beta validation cycles

Introduces a 1182-line beta feedback loop subsystem (ft-1u90p.8.7) that
composes CohortRegistry, FeedbackCollector, BetaEvaluator, and
BetaLoopController into a gate-checked rollout pipeline with:
- Per-cohort SLO conformance (smoothness, latency, friction)
- Qualitative signal aggregation (NPS-style scoring)
- Promotion/Hold/Rollback decisions based on configurable thresholds
- Serde-roundtrippable BetaLoopSnapshot for persistence

The lib.rs module declaration is added to expose beta_feedback_loop
publicly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
